textPlain: So are people storing these things in a non-HIPAA-compliant way or is this mostly attributable to some other vector that would not have been helped by compliance?What a terrible leak - med records and marijuana use, especially in some circles - could be very useful blackmail material. :/
Nearly a million records, which appear to be linked to a medical-cannabis-card company in Ohio, included Social Security numbers, government IDs, health conditions, and more.
my neighborhood weed guy would never betray my trust in this way.
